falling-skies.name: Falling Skies

activation.summary: Ask Mechanic about the downed plane while progressing through Tour.

falling-skies.description: Investigate the crashed aircraft operation and decide what to do with the armored case.
falling-skies.notes: Keeping the armored case results in -0.3 Prapor reputation and changes The Ticket routes.

the-ticket.name: The Ticket

activation.summary: Continue from Falling Skies after obtaining the armored case and start the Mr. Kerman terminal chain.

the-ticket.description: Branches into 4 endings based on player decisions: Savior (help Kerman), Fallen (betray Kerman), Survivor (pay Prapor), Debtor (seek Lightkeeper)
the-ticket.notes: Decision points are mutually exclusive. The armored case choice in Falling Skies affects available optional objectives (Lightkeeper access).
